reviews.review_msg: Overall he is a awesome guy
Hes an amazing professor. I would take his class again and again. Kind of sad hes not teaching calculus 2 next semester but i guess ill get over it. Peace
Midterms were very fair and the final was much harder. There's a lot to learn in this class. This class was more difficult then Calc 3 for me.

Michel's tests are fair, but his lectures are just him reading off his slides. He posts the slides online, and I faired better by learning the content online. Overall his class did not require a lot of work, but just be prepared to learn on your own.
This man is just a lad. Nice guy, good lecturer.

Amazing, hilarious, respectful and approachable professor. You can tell he genuinely cares about the students and wants everyone to exceed. There are no surprises on the midterm and he told us exactly what to expect. Lectures are not mandatory and completed posted notes are uploaded. Highly recommend you take this professor!
Excellent Prof. To bad his hands are tied by Petra.
He would be the best prof if he didnt use Petra Menzs notes and exams. He is funny but needs to make his own exams and notes.
